results.title: Ruthmere continues concert series with Shelest Duo
results.description: ELKHART — Ruthmere’s third Spring Concert of 2026 will feature the Shelest Duo. This concert will take place at 7 p.m. Thursday, May 21, in Ruthmere’s Game Room. Doors open at 6:30 pm.
